description: Phishing templates impersonating IT Service Management platforms

templates.name: ServiceNow Emergency Change Approval
suggested_subject_lines: ServiceNow: Change Request CHG0042891 requires your approval
[ITSM] Critical change request — SLA breach imminent
Action Required: Emergency production access approval
templates.notes: Best targeted at IT operations, DevOps, and change advisory board members. Advanced difficulty — requires target to be familiar with ITSM workflows. Ticket numbers and grid layout add realism.

templates.name: ServiceNow – Access Request Approval
suggested_subject_lines: A request is waiting for your approval in ServiceNow
templates.notes: Approval-workflow lures exploit routine click-to-approve behavior. Strong for any org running ServiceNow.

templates.name: Jira Service Management – Ticket Assigned
suggested_subject_lines: [JSM] A ticket has been assigned to you
You are now the assignee on SD-4471
Action needed: new ticket assigned to you
templates.notes: Assigned-ticket notifications are everyday noise in IT teams, which makes this low-suspicion and effective.
